_about: Fully-worked reference series. Copy this file to <your-series>.json and edit. Reference characters in concepts with [name] placeholders, e.g. 'wide shot of [keeper] climbing the spiral staircase'.
style_anchor: Coastal Maine documentary series in the Tartakovsky cel-animation tradition. Hand-painted backgrounds, thick black ink outlines, flat color fills with NO gradients. Warm dawn key light from camera-left, cool teal shadow side, salt-air haze in midground. Consistent character design across every frame.
world_sheet: Setting: small fishing village on the rocky coast of Maine, late autumn. Time: early dawn, ~30 minutes before sunrise. Atmosphere: salt fog rolling off the harbor, gulls in distance, weathered wooden docks slick with dew, low tide exposing barnacled pilings. Mood: contemplative, quiet, mythic.

character_sheet.keeper: Man in his late 50s, weathered tanned face with crow's-feet, full salt-and-pepper beard, dark blue knit watch cap, faded yellow oilskin jacket with brass buttons, leathery hands. Always shown in 3/4 profile facing the harbor unless the scene specifies otherwise. Body language: deliberate, steady, never rushed.
character_sheet.boat: Small wooden Friendship sloop, sage-green hull with cream waterline stripe, single mast with furled tan-canvas sail, hand-painted name 'Mary K.' in faded white block letters on the transom. Tied to the dock by a thick manila line.
